title: Review: vault simplify + put-without-field
notes: Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: cannot verify Vault's behavior on empty-map write without a live server — if Vault rejects it, the P0 is a non-issue (unreachable path); if it accepts, it is a real write-only path with a misleading error on read. Would raise confidence with: a unit test that mocks vaultrs to return an empty map and verifies the error message is clear, or a confirmed Vault spec that rejects empty data maps. The rest of the diff is formatting (rustfmt), doc additions, and test renames — no logic risk there.
